title: MineScope pipeline parameters
description: Map microbial community activity onto the physical and chemical landscape of a mine site.

input_output_options.title: Input/Output options
input_output_options.description: Define input data paths and output directory.

input_fastq.description: Path to raw metagenomics FASTQ file.
input_fastq.help_text: Provide raw sequencing reads for assembly with MEGAHIT. Mutually exclusive with --input_fasta.

input_fasta.description: Path to pre-assembled contigs (FASTA). Skips MEGAHIT assembly.
input_fasta.help_text: Use this if you already have assembled contigs. The pipeline will skip the assembly step and go directly to MetaPathways annotation.

amplicon_options.title: Amplicon options
amplicon_options.description: Provide pre-processed amplicon data from nf-core/ampliseq.

amplicon_results.help_text: If provided, amplicon-derived taxonomy and diversity metrics are extracted and merged into the gold layer spatial join. Run nf-core/ampliseq separately first, then point this to its output directory.

data_sources.title: Spatial data sources
data_sources.description: Paths to LiDAR terrain and soil chemistry data.

lidar.description: Path to LiDAR terrain grid CSV.
lidar.help_text: CSV with columns: x, y, elevation, slope, aspect, flow_direction. Each row is one grid cell on the mine site.

chemistry.help_text: CSV with columns: x, y, pH, fe_mg_l, cu_mg_l, as_mg_l, zn_mg_l, moisture_pct, sulfate_mg_l. GPS-tagged sample points.

execution_options.title: Execution options
execution_options.description: Resource allocation and reference database configuration.

db_path.help_text: Directory containing MetaPathways reference databases. See SETUP.md for download instructions.
